failed_checks.message: Evidence status supports independent clinician validation claims
Consensus ratings have no unresolved adjudication burden

interpretation_note: A structurally valid evidence bundle is not automatically strong enough for validation claims. This assessment requires completed independent clinician review, reliable clinician agreement, judge-vs-consensus agreement across required dimensions, full corpus coverage, and no unresolved adjudication flags.
